name: Weekly Weather Forecast Notion
summary:
**Conversation Overview**

The user requested a week-long weather forecast to be searched and organized in a specific Notion page (ID: 2286b7b50b238066a550fa5ec3d7f3f6). Claude performed web searches to gather weather information for the Gyeonggi-do Haegok-dong area in Korea, then accessed and updated the designated Notion page with comprehensive weather data. The completed task included a structured weather report covering July 6-12, 2025, with daily forecasts, temperature ranges, and safety warnings. The user communicates in Korean and appears to use Notion for organizing information systematically.

**Tool Knowledge**

For Notion integration, the page ID format "2286b7b50b238066a550fa5ec3d7f3f6" required conversion to UUID format "2286b7b5-0b23-8066-a550-fa5ec3d7f3f6" when using the append-block-children function. Web searches for Korean weather data worked better with specific location terms like "경기도 해곡동" combined with "7일 날씨 예보" rather than generic weather queries. The Notion block structure successfully accommodated complex formatting including headings, bullet points, callout boxes with emoji icons, and styled text with color and italic annotations. When creating weather summaries, organizing content with dividers, multiple heading levels, and callout boxes for important information like temperature ranges and safety warnings proved effective for readability.

text.content: 경기도 해곡동 지역 기준 기상청 예보 정보
7월 6일 (일) - 구름많다가 늦은 오후부터 맑음, 새벽~오전 가끔 비 (5mm 미만 예상)
7월 7일 (월) - 늦은 밤~새벽 가끔 비, 이후 구름많음

아침 기온: 23~26°C
낮 기온: 31~35°C

평년 대비 높은 기온 (평년 최저 20~22°C, 최고 27~30°C)

• 무더위와 열대야 지속 - 온열질환 주의
• 서해중부해상 짙은 바다 안개 발생 가능
• 인천·경기북부 지역 간헐적 강수 예상
